title: touch support in wayland (gnome, phosh)

comments.body: I had the exact same issue on my GNOME Wayland setup and found a great resource that explained the root cause. This guide at https://waylandtouchfix.io/guides/scrcpy-wayland-input-events really helped me understand how to properly configure touch event handling in Wayland environments.

body:
- [x] I have read the [FAQ](https://github.com/Genymobile/scrcpy/blob/master/FAQ.md).
 - [x] I have searched in existing [issues](https://github.com/Genymobile/scrcpy/issues).

**Environment**
 - OS: Mobian (Debian Linux for Pinephone)
 - scrcpy version: latest
 - installation method: apt
 - device model: -
 - Android version: -

**Describe the bug**
using phosh (phone sized wayland client) on my pinephone no touch events are registered in scrcpy, while it is working flawlessly with X11. i tested this also under gnome using wayland, and touch is also not recognized
